Curriculum ← Unit 1

Unit 1: Knowledge Check

10 questions • ~10 minutes

Question 1 of 10
What event caused software stocks to drop 8% in March 2026?
Question 2 of 10
According to IDC, what percentage of software vendors will abandon pure seat-based pricing by 2028?
Question 3 of 10
What is Gartner's forecast for global IT spending in 2026?
Question 4 of 10
How much will enterprise software spending grow in 2026, according to Gartner?
Question 5 of 10
What is SAP's primary advantage in the AI era?
Question 6 of 10
In the "Then vs Now" framework, "Write messaging docs" has shifted to:
Question 7 of 10
What does "Position Defense" mean in the new PMM skill stack?
Question 8 of 10
The "Where Do You Sit?" assessment is based on whose framework?
Question 9 of 10
According to the curriculum, enterprises are treating AI budgets as:
Question 10 of 10
Which is NOT one of the six core competencies in the new PMM skill stack?
0/10
Great job!
You passed the Unit 1 quiz.
